_comment: Disabled: @signalk/signalk-autopilot 2.5+ ships an ESM default export (exports.default = ...), but signalk-server 2.13.x's plugin loader calls the bare require() result directly, producing 'pluginConstructor is not a function'. Re-enable when SK upstream unwraps .default in lib/interfaces/plugins.js, or when the plugin reverts to CJS module.exports = fn. test_autopilot.py is designed to skip cleanly when the plugin isn't running.
